name: Rhubarb Muffins
recipeInstructions:
1. Beat well together the sugar, oil, egg, vanilla, and buttermilk.
2. Stir in the diced rhubarb and chopped nuts.
3. Combine the dry ingredients (flour, baking soda, baking powder, salt, sugar, and cinnamon) in a separate bowl.
4. Mix the dry ingredients into the rhubarb mixture until just combined.
5. Fill muffin papers 2/3 full with the batter.
6. Combine the topping ingredients (melted oleo and remaining sugar, cinnamon) in another small bowl.
7. Scatter the topping evenly over the tops of the muffins.
8. Bake at 400°F for 20-25 minutes or until a toothpick inserted into the center comes out clean.
